/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--no-undefined -shared  -o "D7SChannelStripFull_artefacts/VST3/D7S Channel Strip FULL.vst3/Contents/x86_64-linux/D7S Channel Strip FULL.so" CMakeFiles/D7SChannelStripFull_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.cpp.o CMakeFiles/D7SChannelStripFull_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/D7SChannelStripFull_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/D7SChannelStripFull_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/D7SChannelStripFull_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/D7SChannelStripFull_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/D7SChannelStripFull_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/D7SChannelStripFull_VST3.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.cpp.o  "D7SChannelStripFull_artefacts/libD7S Channel Strip FULL_SharedCode.a" /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfontconfig.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libasound.so -lrt -ldl -lpthread
